description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cabinet with a light wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The front features two large, flat doors with a smooth, matte white surface, framed by the natural wood texture. The back and sides are entirely wood-textured, with no visible openings or hardware. The rear side displays two small, round black locks or knobs, suggesting secure storage compartments. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items. The overall appearance is modern and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with two matte white front doors and a flat, sturdy top. Minimalist design with secure rear locks and a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, matte white doors framed by light wood.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous light wood grain texture with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with two wood-textured panels and two small black locks or knobs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing uninterrupted wood grain.
